userStories.title: Add test for tmpFile.Close() error path
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to test the file close error handling in runSopsDecrypt so that all error paths are covered.
acceptanceCriteria: Add test that triggers tmpFile.Close() error at decrypt.go:194-195
Use mock file implementation that returns error on Close()
Verify error message contains 'failed to close temp file'
go tool cover -func shows 100% for runSopsDecrypt
userStories.notes: Use withTempFileCreator option to inject mock file that fails on Close()

userStories.title: Add test for yaml.Marshal error path
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to test the yaml.Marshal error handling in parseDecryptedYAML so that all error paths are covered.
acceptanceCriteria: Add test that triggers yaml.Marshal failure at decrypt.go:256-258
Use a complex type that cannot be marshaled (e.g., channel or function)
Verify error message contains 'failed to marshal value'
go tool cover -func shows 100% for parseDecryptedYAML
userStories.notes: The parseDecryptedYAML function is not exported, so tests must use exported API or inject unmarshalable type into parsed map

userStories.title: Update codecov.yml for 100% target
userStories.description: As a project maintainer, I want to configure Codecov.io to require 100% coverage so that coverage regressions fail CI.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify ignore patterns cover all non-production code: cmd/**/*, test/**/*, **/zz_generated*.go, **/*_test.go

userStories.title: Verify all coverage gaps are addressed
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to verify the project achieves 100% test coverage so that the coverage target is met.
acceptanceCriteria: Run go tool cover -func=coverage.out and verify pkg/sops/decrypt.go shows 100% for all functions
Run go tool cover -func=coverage.out and verify internal/controller/sopssecret_controller.go shows 100% for all functions
Upload coverage to Codecov.io and verify 100% project coverage
All packages show either 100% or are in ignore list
